categories.description: Sent to admin + existing guardians + the new guardian's User when they're added to an athlete. Confirms the addition + verification-pending state.
Sent to admin + remaining guardians when a guardian is removed. Cannot-opt-out — every co-parent should know when the roster changes.

Sent to the affected guardian when their role flags change (has_legal_custody, can_pickup, can_receive_communications, can_authorise_medical_care). Confirms the change so the guardian knows what they can and cannot do.
Sent to the guardian + admin when their verification completes. Includes the verification_method (auto-household / hr-manual / silent-acceptance).
Sent to guardian + admin + safeguarding_officer when a verified guardian is flagged for review. Consent-recording BLOCKED until resolved. Cannot-opt-out.
Sent to all guardians of the athlete + admin when the primary guardian shifts. Cannot-opt-out — every guardian should know who currently holds primary status.
